title: Chibi Maruko-chan: A Boy from Italy
original_title: 映画ちびまる子ちゃん イタリアから来た少年
overview: Students from five different countries arrive in Maruko's town. Maruko and her classmates can barely contain their curiosity, and their new friends are full of surprises. And Maruko's family will house a boy from Italy!
